texto: An Arabian proverb says there are four sorts of men: He who knows not and knows not he knows not: he is a fool-shun him. He who knows not and knows he knows not: he is simple-teach him. He who knows and knows not he knows: he is asleep-wake him. He who knows and knows he knows: he is wise-follow him.
explicacao: Citação de Lady Isabel Burton sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “An Arabian proverb says there are four sorts of men: He who knows not and knows not he knows not:…” articula reflexao, happiness, knows em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
